recap: Spain's dominance proved decisive as Mikel Oyarzabal's two goals bookended their 3-0 victory over Austria, with an early Cucurella goal disallowed for a corner foul before Pedro Porro's 61st-minute header extended their control. Luis de la Fuente's side, seeking their first knockout win since 2010, methodically suffocated Austria throughout the match and sealed the result when Oyarzabal converted in the 89th minute to set up a round-of-16 clash against Portugal or Croatia.
